title: Stale Claim Event
description: Event emitted when a stale bead claim is detected or transferred under the fungibility doctrine (soc-vuu6.27). Consumed by `ao beads stale-claims` (read-only listing) and `ao beads resume` (atomic transfer). Persisted to docs/provenance/ledger.jsonl by the transfer code so the bd audit trail records who picked up whose work and why. Schema lands FIRST (slice 1) so subsequent Go code (slices 2 + 3) and the daemon job (slice 4) all consume the same shape.

schema_version.description: Bumped when shape changes; consumers gate on this.

event_type.description: stale_detected = `ao beads stale-claims` surfaced this in its listing. claim_transferred = `ao beads resume` performed an atomic transfer. Both forms ship as the same record so consumers don't branch on shape.

bead_id.description: The bead whose claim is stale (or just transferred).

detected_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of detection or transfer.

original_claimant.description: The agent identity that originally claimed the bead and is now considered stale.

new_claimant.description: REQUIRED for event_type == claim_transferred. The agent that picked up the work. OMITTED for stale_detected.

evidence.description: Why this claim was deemed stale. At least one of last_touch_ts / worktree_quiet_since / heartbeat_expired_at must be present; multiple signals strengthen the determination.

last_touch_ts.description: Last bd activity (update, comment, status change) attributed to the original claimant on this bead.

claim_age_hours.description: Hours between the claim being taken and detected_at.

worktree_quiet_since.description: Most recent commit or file-change timestamp under the worktree associated with this bead. Absent = no worktree association or no commits yet.

heartbeat_expired_at.description: When the agent's session-bootstrap heartbeat (vuu6.25) was last seen, if heartbeats are wired.

threshold_hours.description: The staleness threshold in hours that the detector applied. Defaults to 4 if absent.

last_evidence_event.description: Free-text descriptor of the most recent operationally-meaningful event (e.g. 'commit cce097cf', 'bd update notes', 'gh pr push'). Used in human-readable listings.

transfer.description: REQUIRED for event_type == claim_transferred. Captures the atomic-update fingerprint so concurrent transfer attempts are auditable.

prior_revision.description: The bead's revision/etag/version at the moment the transfer was attempted. Used for optimistic-concurrency control.

notes_appended.description: True when the transferring command also wrote a bd note crediting both agents.

runtime.description: Optional. Which runtime the agent ran in.
